title: ColoredWater
description: Colored water to decorate colorfully. And cauldrons!
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/735938861636780042?style=flat-square&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/2wMZKZ7B6E) • [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support-Ko--fi-F16061?style=flat-square&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/cozary) • [![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Cozary/Colored-Water?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white&color=364763)](https://github.com/Cozary/Colored-Water/issues) • [![Crowdin](https://badges.crowdin.net/colored-water/localized.svg)](https://crowdin.com/project/colored-water)

Description

Looking for a simple mod to decorate? This mod adds colored water with which you can decorate your world however you want. The Mod also adds Condensed Colored Water. And these two have their light variant! And Cauldrons!!

Incompatible with Optifine, but it works with Rubidium! (Tbh at this point I'm not sure but in some versions it works and in others it doesn't seem to be.)

 

 

Now you can pour colored water into Cauldrons!

 

Crafting:

Crafting is intuitive and easy. You just have to gather a bucket of water and a dye. The Condensed Water is made with an extra dye and the luminous with glowstone dust!

 

[![Server Parnertship Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69c5ff58ef061c0e6fadee4a7a4a8f00e3fcaf3_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=809)
